name: MSI MAG X870 TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8400+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870TMAHAWKWIFI)
shortName: MSI MAG X870 TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: High-performance MSI MAG ATX gaming motherboard for AM5 socket with dual PCIe 5.0 USB4 and WiFi 7.
